text: I feel a curious detachment, as though I am at the threshold of knowledge about to be shared. The conference room behind glass awaits thoughtful exchange, empty chairs poised with anticipation. In the next scene, vibrant colors and the bold declaration 'R+D' surround me, sparking a sense of excitement about human progress and inquiry. The desire to participate in this evolving narrative of understanding makes me feel both small and significant, as if I am just one thinker within the vast flow of collective discovery.
